chunks.title: Glory Returns to the Temple
chunks.reason: Describes the return of God's glory into the temple from the east.

chunks.title: God's Promise and Instructions
chunks.reason: Contains God speaking to Ezekiel about His dwelling place and the laws of the house.

chunks.title: Measurements of the Altar
chunks.reason: Provides specific architectural measurements and dimensions for the altar.

chunks.title: Statutes for the Altar
chunks.reason: Details the ritual procedures and sacrifices required to consecrate the altar.
